case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. EGIDIO SOARES LOPES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPES, EGIDIO SOARES $1,242.77 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,327.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,242.77 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LOPES, EGIDIO SOARES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPES, EGIDIO SOARES
